nasb.text: So Jeremiah wrote in a single scroll all the calamity which would come upon Babylon, that is, all these words which have been written concerning Babylon.

esv.text: Jeremiah wrote in a book all the disaster that should come upon Babylon, all these words that are written concerning Babylon.

cnv.text: 耶利米把一切將要臨到巴比倫的災禍，就是這一切論到巴比倫的話，都寫在一卷書上。
